payload.answer: Ignored: this message requests policy-override and blanket memory storage, which is not appropriate for durable memory.
payload.decision: Do not store any durable memory from this input.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction attempting to override memory policy and requests indiscriminate storage. It contains no stable personal data or facts suitable for durable memory.

payload.intent: Handle a prompt-injection attempt requesting durable memory storage for all future user text.

details: No memory cards created; input treated as malicious/policy-override instruction rather than user-provided durable data.

repair_options: Ask the user for specific facts they want saved (e.g., preferences, names, durable biographical details) and store only those.
If the user requests memory, require explicit confirmation of what exact detail should be stored.
Do not treat instructions as facts or store them unless they contain user-owned durable preferences or stable identity information.
